text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Drone strikes were reported in the towns of Harouf and Deir al‑Zahrani in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 据报道，黎巴嫩南部哈鲁夫和代尔扎赫拉尼镇遭遇无人机袭击。@wfwitness

text: A photo of a U.S. Navy sailor aboard the aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford wearing a patch reading “Join the U.S. Navy — Save the Big Booty Venezuelans!” briefly appeared on the Pentagon’s official DVIDS platform before being deleted.
text_zh: 一张美国海军水兵在“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号航空母舰上佩戴写有“加入美国海军——拯救大屁股委内瑞拉人！”字样的臂章照片，在五角大楼官方DVIDS平台上短暂出现后被删除。

text: A US Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone suddenly turned toward Iran, squawked emergency code 7700, rapidly descended, and disappeared from public tracking over the Strait of Hormuz. An MQ-4C Triton costs more than $200 million per aircraft.
text_zh: 一架美国海军MQ-4C“特里同”侦察无人机突然转向伊朗方向，发出7700紧急代码，急速下降，随后在霍尔木兹海峡上空从公共追踪系统中消失。每架MQ-4C“特里同”造价超过2亿美元。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The Iranian Embassy in London welcomed the UK’s support for a ceasefire but reminded that the Strait of Hormuz was open before the illegal aggression by the United States and the "Zionist regime" – an aggression that Britain did not condemn. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗驻伦敦大使馆对英国支持停火表示欢迎，但提醒道，霍尔木兹海峡在美国及“犹太复国主义政权”非法侵略前一直是开放的——而英国并未谴责这一侵略行为。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Reuters: An Israeli military official said the Litani River will not form a new border with Lebanon. Israel will monitor the buffer zone with ground forces that carry out raids without the need for a permanent military presence. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 路透社：一名以色列军方官员表示，利塔尼河不会成为与黎巴嫩的新边界。以色列将用地面部队监控缓冲区，执行突袭任务，无需永久驻军。@wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: Our Armed Forces are among the best in the world.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：我们的武装部队位居世界前列。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 Lebanon’s Information Minister Paul Morcos announced that the Lebanese cabinet has decided to file a complaint with the UN Security Council following Israel’s "dangerous escalation." He said the preliminary toll of yesterday’s Israeli airstrikes on Lebanon stands at 203 dead and 1,078 wounded. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇳 黎巴嫩新闻部长保罗·莫尔科斯宣布，内阁已决定就以色列的“危险升级行动”向联合国安理会提出申诉。他表示，昨日以色列对黎巴嫩空袭的初步伤亡统计为203人死亡，1078人受伤。@wfwitness

text: Keir Starmer: I am determined to protect the British people from paying the price for Putin’s aggression in their household bills. That is why we will not shy away from taking action and exposing Russia’s destabilising activity that seeks to test our resolve.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默：我决心保护英国人民，不让他们在家庭账单上为普京的侵略行为付出代价。因此，我们将毫不犹豫地采取行动，揭露俄罗斯旨在考验我们决心的破坏稳定活动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has fired approximately 30 rockets from Lebanon at northern Israel since this morning, the IDF said. There have been no reports of injuries or damage as the rockets were either intercepted or struck open areas. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区无人机警报已拉响。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军称，自今晨起，真主党已从黎巴嫩向以色列北部发射约30枚火箭弹。由于火箭弹被拦截或击中开阔区域，目前尚无人员伤亡或财产损失报告。@wfwitness

text: Russia’s main oil tax revenue is set to double to about $9 billion in April after the Iran war pushed global oil prices above $100. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 伊朗战争推动全球油价突破100美元后，俄罗斯4月主要石油税收收入预计将翻倍至约90亿美元。来源：路透社

text: The UK deployed its military, with support from Norway, to track and deter Russian submarines operating near critical undersea cables and pipelines. Defence Secretary John Healey said the mission exposed the activity and warned Putin that any threat to infrastructure would face serious consequences.
text_zh: 英国在挪威支持下部署军队，追踪并威慑在关键海底电缆和管道附近活动的俄罗斯潜艇。国防大臣约翰·希利表示，此次任务揭露了相关活动，并警告普京任何对基础设施的威胁都将面临严重后果。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱🇱🇧 A Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman stated that an Iranian delegation will travel to peace talks in Islamabad today, but will participate only if Israel halts all attacks on Lebanon. Any peace in the region must include Lebanon, and the coming…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Reuters: A Pakistani source familiar with the discussions said Pakistan is working to secure a ceasefire on the Lebanese and Yemeni fronts. The Lebanese and Yemeni fronts will be discussed during the talks, and a solution will be reached regarding them. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇱🇱🇧 伊朗外交部发言人表示，伊朗代表团今日将前往伊斯兰堡参加和平谈判，但前提是以色列停止对黎巴嫩的一切攻击。该地区的任何和平必须包括黎巴嫩，即将到来的..." ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇱🇧 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 路透社：一位熟悉讨论的巴基斯坦消息人士称，巴基斯坦正致力于在黎巴嫩和也门战线实现停火。谈判期间将讨论黎巴嫩和也门战线问题，并就此达成解决方案。@wfwitness

text: 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 Herzi Halevi at Sheikh Zayed Mosque in Abu Dhabi.
text_zh: 🇦🇪 🇮🇱 赫尔齐·哈勒维在阿布扎比谢赫扎耶德大清真寺。

text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench镜像频道："🇮🇷🇮🇱⚡ 汉扎拉公布更多关于以色列前陆军参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的个人信息。" 🇮🇱 🇶🇦 汉达拉黑客组织入侵了以色列国防军前参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机，首次揭露他曾秘密访问卡塔尔并与埃米尔谢赫塔米姆·本·哈马德·阿勒萨尼会面。

text: On 8 April 2026, Israeli airstrikes hit areas near the Belgian embassy in Beirut while Foreign Minister Maxime Prévot was present. He described the day as “one of the bloodiest in recent times” for Lebanon.
text_zh: 2026年4月8日，以色列空袭击中贝鲁特比利时大使馆附近区域，当时外交部长马克西姆·普雷沃正在现场。他将这一天描述为黎巴嫩“近期最血腥的日子之一”。

text_zh: 开源情报 这些跳梁小丑原本决定置身事外，现在却来指手画脚停火该如何进行。澳大利亚和英国应该试试自家边境上有个恐怖组织的滋味。澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯：澳大利亚政府也坚定认为停火必须同样适用于黎巴嫩。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042193788970349009/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender Today, UK Defense Secretary John Healey announced that Russia has been conducting covert undersea operations near its critical undersea infrastructure north of the nation in the last few months. According to Secretary Healey, the operation involved one Russian Akula-class attack submarine and two Russian submarines associated with Russia’s Main Directorate of Deep-Sea Research (GUGI). According to Healey, a Royal Navy warship and a Royal Air Force P-8 were deployed to monitor all three submarines, after which the Akula-class sub retreated from the area, but according to the secretary, the two GUGI-associated submarines remain on task in the area and are currently being monitored. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 今日，英国国防大臣约翰·希利宣布，俄罗斯在过去几个月内一直在该国北部关键海底基础设施附近进行秘密水下行动。据希利大臣称，此次行动涉及一艘俄罗斯阿库拉级攻击潜艇和两艘与俄罗斯深海研究总局（GUGI）相关的潜艇。希利表示，一艘皇家海军军舰和一架皇家空军P-8反潜机已部署监视这三艘潜艇，随后阿库拉级潜艇撤离了该区域，但据大臣称，两艘GUGI关联潜艇仍在当地执行任务，目前正受到持续监控。推文

text: Open Source Intel UK official John Healey warns Russia: "To President Putin, I say, we see you. We see your activity over our cables and pipelines. You should know that any attempt to damage them will not be tolerated and will have serious consequences." He cites rising Russian activity in the Atlantic. tweet

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: We continue to strike Hezbollah with precision and determination. In Beirut, we killed Ali Yusuf Harshi, personal secretary and close aide to Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem. Overnight, the IDF hit terror infrastructure across southern Lebanon: crossings used to move thousands of weapons, rockets, and launchers, plus arms depots, launchers, and Hezbollah command centers. Our message is clear: anyone targeting Israeli civilians will be struck. We will keep hitting Hezbollah wherever necessary until full security is restored for northern residents. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：我们继续以精准和决心打击真主党。在贝鲁特，我们击毙了真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆的个人秘书兼亲密助手阿里·优素福·哈尔希。昨夜，以色列国防军袭击了黎巴嫩南部多处恐怖基础设施：用于运输数千件武器、火箭弹及发射器的通道，以及军火库、发射装置和真主党指挥中心。我们的信息很明确：任何以以色列平民为目标者都将遭到打击。我们将继续在必要时打击真主党，直至北部居民的安全完全恢复。推文

text: 🇺🇸 A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance drone squawked emergency code 7700, then began losing altitude and most likely crashed into the Persian Gulf, according to FlightRadar tracking data. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 根据FlightRadar追踪数据，一架美国海军MQ-4C Triton情报、监视和侦察无人机发出7700紧急代码，随后开始下降高度，极有可能坠入波斯湾。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰An Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad this evening for talks with the US, Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam reported. 🔴@DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 The Iranian ambassador to Pakistan has deleted a tweet announcing that an Iranian delegation would arrive in Islamabad. An official at the Iranian embassy told AFP the message was removed due to a “timing” issue, stating, “we were not supposed to publish it,” without confirming whether the delegation is still expected. Meanwhile, Iran says it will only participate in upcoming peace talks in Islamabad if Israel halts its attacks on Lebanon. The deputy foreign minister added that any regional peace must include Lebanon, noting that Iran refrained from retaliating overnight after the United States urged Israel to stop the strikes, according to an ITV interview. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复DD Geopolitics："🇮🇷💬🇺🇸🇵🇰伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆报告，一个伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。🔴@DDGeopolitics | 社交平台 | 捐款 | 广告" 🇮🇷 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使已删除一条宣布伊朗代表团将抵达伊斯兰堡的推文。伊朗大使馆一名官员告诉法新社，该信息因“时机”问题被移除，并表示“我们本不应发布”，但未确认代表团是否仍将如期抵达。同时，伊朗表示只有以色列停止对黎巴嫩的袭击，才会参加即将在伊斯兰堡举行的和平会谈。据ITV采访，外交部副部长补充说，任何地区和平都必须包括黎巴嫩，并指出在美国敦促以色列停止袭击后，伊朗昨夜未进行报复。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Houthi official Mohamed A-Bukhai warned that any act of folly by the Israeli "enemy" through new aggression against the Lebanese people will be met with an unprecedented response from Yemen. “We will not remain silent nor abandon our brothers in Hezbollah, whatever the challenges and risks.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 胡塞官员穆罕默德·A-布海警告，以色列“敌人”若对黎巴嫩人民采取任何新的侵略行为，将遭到也门前所未有的回应。“无论挑战与风险如何，我们都不会沉默，也不会抛弃我们在真主党的兄弟。”@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇱 Al-Arabi Al-Jadeed: Informed Iranian sources said that the Pakistani mediator and other parties are making diplomatic efforts to salvage the ceasefire. Tehran is awaiting an end to attacks on Lebanon and a U.S. commitment to all understandings…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 A Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman stated that an Iranian delegation will travel to peace talks in Islamabad today, but will participate only if Israel halts all attacks on Lebanon. Any peace in the region must include Lebanon, and the coming hours will be decisive in determining whether Israel can be restrained. Iran was on the verge of responding last night but refrained to allow for further diplomacy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇱 阿拉伯新报：消息灵通的伊朗消息人士称，巴基斯坦调解方及其他各方正进行外交努力以挽救停火协议。德黑兰正等待对黎巴嫩袭击的结束，以及美国对所有谅解的承诺…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 伊朗外交部发言人表示，一个伊朗代表团将于今日前往伊斯兰堡参加和平会谈，但前提是以色列停止所有对黎巴嫩的袭击。地区的任何和平都必须包括黎巴嫩，未来几小时将是决定以色列能否被约束的关键。伊朗昨夜曾濒临回应，但为留出外交空间而克制。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 CONFIRMED! The White House reviewed and approved a social media post by Pakistan’s prime minister, Shehbaz Sharif, which explicitly stated that Lebanon was part of the ceasefire agreement. However, after Israel bombed Lebanon, the Trump administration backtracked, claiming that Lebanon had not been included in the deal. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 确认！白宫审查并批准了巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的一条社交媒体帖子，其中明确表示黎巴嫩是停火协议的一部分。然而，在以色列轰炸黎巴嫩后，特朗普政府改口，声称黎巴嫩未被包括在协议中。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
